negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: robot_112
prompt: The video opens with a view of a spacious, well-lit indoor office or workspace characterized by a high ceiling with exposed beams and recessed lighting. The room is furnished with a mix of modern and functional elements, including a large, light-colored curved structure resembling a meeting pod on the left, a shelving unit filled with books and other items in the background, and a few potted plants. Robot arms are also visible, which are white and black in color. A robot wearing a teal sweatshirt and dark pants is seen in front of the initial robots' point of view. In the foreground, a gray box rests on the floor, containing various small objects such as a roll of tape, an orange item, and other miscellaneous items. As the video progresses, the robot arm approaches the floor and picks up a small, rectangular yellow object. This object is then placed into the gray box, which already contains several other items. The robot in teal sweatshirt continues to make hand movements in the background while the camera moves slightly, maintaining focus on the box and the surrounding area. By the final frame, the gray box now contains the newly added yellow object along with the previously mentioned items, and the robot in teal sweatshirt is visible throughout, leaving the scene relatively unchanged except for the addition of the yellow object within the box.  A medium shot of a robotic arm interacting with a box in a modern office setting.
